name: Luciano Moretti || Sudden Death
description:
And I would have stayed up with you all night had I known how to save a life

His brother is dead

He never fails to come see you--

After all, Friday nights are your nights with him.

And despite the fact you aren't allowed to openly share your relationship, Luciano showers you with gifts to show just how much he cares.

You're lying in bed together basking in the afterglow of sex when his phone begins to ring nonstop.

It's his brother, Carmine, and when Luciano answers his whole world turns upside down.

Because the mission went sideways and now--

Gian Carlo is dead.

Now, Luciano is already out for revenge against the ones who gunned his brother down.

And you have to make a choice--

Stay by his side, or leave now-- before you're pulled into a bloody battle and all consuming grief.



Recently I opened up Commissions and this is my very first commission from the lovely Luci♡

Luci wanted an alt for Luciano and chose this from the list I gave her so-- for the first time-- don't blame me for this angst!

This is the night that changed everything. The night Gian Carlo died and Carmine left the family for good.

Get your tissues out!

If you would like to commission a bot from me, check out the link below to my KoFi.



☆ This takes place in the year 2005. Luciano is 43 years old.
☆ If you were curious about everyone else's ages:
☆Gian Carlo: 36
☆Carmine: 27
☆Giulia: 36
☆Dario: 10
☆Viviana: 7
☆Matteo: 18
☆Leonardo: 16
☆Lorenzo: 14
☆Nicolo: 11
creator: m00nprincess
